prompt: I'm starting a new Hugo site for a C++ course I'm teaching. I need to set it up with the Zen theme, version 0.161.0. The site will have modules, homework assignments, and resources. What are the initialization steps and how should I structure my content directories?

assertions.name: includes-git-submodule-setup
assertions.description: Response explains git initialization and adding Zen theme as a submodule

assertions.name: shows-hugo-config
assertions.description: Provides hugo.toml with theme and taxonomy configuration

assertions.name: course-structure
assertions.description: Shows directory structure for modules, homework, and resources

assertions.name: explains-reasoning
assertions.description: Explains WHY each setup step matters (not just HOW)
